items.title: MedX Health Appoints Global Skin Science Leader Dr. Paul Matts as Strategic Advisor
items.description: MISSISSAUGA, Ontario, September 09, 2025--MedX Health Corp. (TSXV: MDX), "MedX" or the "Company"), a global leader in teledermatology and non-invasive skin analysis, today announced the appointment of Dr. Paul J. Matts, internationally recognized skin scientist, biochemist and educator, as Strategic Advisor to the Company.
